label: connect
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 connect --solver ls_dyna
output:
[sim] connect: session ready
{
    "session_id": "lsdyna-1776153958",
    "solver": "ls_dyna",
    "mode": "meshing",
    "ui_mode": "no_gui",
    "connected_at": 1776153958.5025191,
    "run_count": 0,
    "profile": null,
    "skills": {
        "root": null,
        "index": null,
        "active_sdk_layer": null,
        "active_solver_layer": null,
        "hint": "set SIM_SKILLS_ROOT or place sim-skills/ next to sim-cli/"
    }
}

label: copy-mesh
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import shutil, os; src=r'E:\simcli\sim-skills\lsdyna\base\workflows\pydyna_pipe\nodes.k'; dst=str(workdir / 'nodes.k'); shutil.copy(src, dst); _result = {'mesh_at': dst, 'size': os.path.getsize(dst)}

label: title
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.title = 'Pipe 鈥?sim CLI session E2E'

label: control-cards
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.ControlTermination(endtim=20.0), kwd.ControlEnergy(hgen=2, rwen=2, slnten=2), kwd.ControlOutput(npopt=1, neecho=3), kwd.ControlShell(istupd=1)])

label: database-cards
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.DatabaseBinaryD3Plot(dt=1.00), kwd.DatabaseExtentBinary(ieverp=1), kwd.DatabaseGlstat(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseMatsum(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseJntforc(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseRbdout(dt=0.10), kwd.DatabaseRcforc(dt=0.10)])

label: contact
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.ContactForceTransducerPenalty(surfa=1, surfatyp=3), kwd.ContactAutomaticSingleSurface(ssid=3, sstyp=2, fs=0.30, fd=0.30), kwd.SetPartList(sid=3, parts=[1, 2])])

label: initial-rotation
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.InitialVelocityGeneration(id=5, omega=-0.082, xc=-78.50, yc=-610.13, zc=5.69, nx=1.0), kwd.SetPartList(sid=5, parts=[1, 2])])

label: pipe-parts
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import pandas as pd; pp = kwd.Part(); pp.parts = pd.DataFrame({'heading': ['Deformable-Pipe', 'Pipe-End', 'Rigid-Pipe'], 'pid': [1, 2, 3], 'secid': [1, 2, 2], 'mid': [1, 2, 1]}); deck.append(pp)

label: pipe-materials
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.MatPlasticKinematic(mid=1, ro=7.86e-6, e=200.0, pr=0.30, sigy=0.250, etan=0.00689), kwd.MatRigid(mid=2, ro=7.86e-6, e=200.0, pr=0.30), kwd.SectionShell(secid=1, elfrom=2, nip=5, t1=11.0, t2=11.0, t3=11.0, t4=11.0), kwd.SectionShell(secid=2, elfrom=2, nip=3, t1=11.0, t2=11.0, t3=11.0, t4=11.0)])

label: bracket
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.Part(heading='Bracket', pid=4, secid=4, mid=4), kwd.MatRigid(mid=4, ro=7.86e-6, e=200.0, pr=0.30, cmo=1, con1=7, con2=7), kwd.SectionSolid(secid=4)])

label: deformable-to-rigid
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.extend([kwd.DeformableToRigid(pid=1), kwd.DeformableToRigid(pid=2)])

label: include-mesh
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.append(kwd.Include(filename='nodes.k'))

label: inspect-deck
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect deck.summary
output:
{
  "ok": true,
  "title": "Pipe \u9225?sim CLI session E2E",
  "n_keywords": 27,
  "keyword_types": [

  "has_elements": false,
  "has_material": true
}

label: export-deck
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec deck.export_file(str(workdir / 'pipe.k'))

label: solve
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec run_dyna('pipe.k', working_directory=str(workdir), stream=False)

label: inspect-files
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect workdir.files

label: inspect-results
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 inspect results.summary

label: extract-energies
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec gke_op = dpf.operators.result.global_kinetic_energy(); gke_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ke = gke_op.eval().get_field(0).data; gie_op = dpf.operators.result.global_internal_energy(); gie_op.inputs.data_sources.connect(_data_sources); ie = gie_op.eval().get_field(0).data; _result = {'n_states': len(ke), 'ke_max': float(max(ke)), 'ke_final': float(ke[-1]), 'ie_max': float(max(ie)), 'ie_final': float(ie[-1])}

label: extract-displacement
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 exec import numpy as np; disp_op = model.results.displacement.on_last_time_freq(); disp_field = disp_op.eval().get_field(0); disp_arr = np.asarray(disp_field.data).reshape(-1, 3); norms = np.linalg.norm(disp_arr, axis=1); _result = {'n_nodes': int(disp_arr.shape[0]), 'max_disp_mm': float(norms.max()), 'mean_disp_mm': float(norms.mean())}

label: disconnect
command: sim --host 127.0.0.1 --port 7700 disconnect
